name: Dileep Dileep
text:
ಸಿಬ್ಬಂದಿಗಳು ಸೇಹಪರರು ಹಾಗು ಅತ್ಯುತ್ತಮ ಸೇವೆಯನ್ನು ಒದಗಿಸುತ್ತಾರೆ.
ಹಾಗು ಎಲ್ಲಾ ವಸ್ತುಗಳನ್ನು ತ್ವರಿತವಾಗಿ ತಲುಪಿಸುತ್ತಾರೆ,
ಉತ್ತಮ ಗುಣಮಟ್ಟದ ಉತ್ಪನ್ನಗಳು ಹಾಗು
ಇವರು ಉತ್ಪಾದಿಸುವ ಟ್ರೋಫಿಗಳು ನಿಜವಾಗಿಯೂ ಕಲಾಕೃತಿಗಳಾಗಿವೆ
ಉತ್ತಮ ಅನುಭವದೊಂದಿಗೆ ನಾನು ನಿಸ್ಸಂದೇಹವಾಗಿ ಮೇರು ಟ್ರೋಫಿಯನ್ನು ಶಿಫಾರಸು ಮಾಡುತ್ತೇನೆ ಧನ್ಯವಾದಗಳು

text:
Owner and staff was polite and very helpful. Prices were reasonable, and found all that I needed for my event.
The shop is good for buying trophies/medal/certificate and personalized gifts/goodies.
The delivery was quick and whole process was hassle-free.
Highly recommended.

name: Shilika
text:
One of the best trophy stores in Bangalore that I've come across so far! Had such a great experience working with the Meru Trophy team. From the very first chat, you could tell they really care, not just about how the trophy looks, but about what it means. Super easy to work with, quick to respond, and genuinely thoughtful with their input. Made the whole process feel smooth and special.

The owner is quite soft spoken, and has a variety of trophies to choose from at a really affordable rate. I was amazed with the rates & quality experience. 100% recommend Meru Trophy without a doubt. This has now become my go to store for all this trophies <3

Went there again today, and the quality & variety is crazy - can't believe I found this gem in the heart of Bangalore. I also visited other stores but there is no service like Meru Trophy, they are best in business and if you'd like to believe me once just visit their store.

name: Riya Jain
text:
Good service, good store with nice products
at best price👍

I placed the order by simply calling the store and transferring the payment online with the trophy pics from website. Meru trophy did timely delivery and I was able to use the trophy for our school's annual day function. They even did the custom printing on a short notice as it was very urgent for my school. It was a last minute order but still thanks to owner Mr. Naresh for fulfilling it.

They were also very active on Whatsapp to reply to any questions or queries.

Good customer service, keep it up👍🙂

name: Neelam Jain
text:
This is one of the best trophy stores I've come across in the recent times, ek dum mast...
The services are so fantastic with hardworking staff that's always eager and willing to help and prompt behaviour.

It would be great to see multiple franchisee of your stores all over Bangalore, and can't wait to buy more amazing trophies from this super affordable store. Full paisa vasool with best rates🥹👌👌💯

100% recommend, very satisfy with quality🙂🙂

name: Naseem Pasha
text:
I visited this place by going thru google reviews, I first thought all 5 star ratings might be fake or paid ones, until I personally met them.
Owner is of very kind nature & soft spoken, Mr.Yuvaraj was very patiently handling all our queries & suggesting the trophies, whereas Mr.Murali, the guy making stickers was equally polite & co-operative. The other 2 staff packing our items are very good & quick in their job.
They have a wide range of trophies, momentos, medals, cups, shields....all under one roof. I definitely recommend everyone looking out for trophies to visit this place once & believe me you wont come empty handed.
Thanks to the MERU TEAM for their support & kind behaviour.

text: Wish I had ten stars there really deserve it... Went at closing time had so much to change they didn't bother about time and worked on last minute changes took more than an hour... People there are willing to help and support even the last minute changes they were ready to work with a great attitude it was a half day along with government holiday they open for us and yet extended for two hours more...I can't be more thankful to these guys... Definitely go for them really amazing to work with and flexible with rates they are my go to from now on... Just give them a try you will thank me later...

name: George Ebenezer
text:
**Review for Mr. Naresh and Team - ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐**

I recently had the pleasure of working with Mr. Naresh for our Camp Precious, an initiative aimed at supporting children from difficult backgrounds. I cannot express enough how impressed we were with the quality of the awards and momentos he provided.

From the outset, Mr. Naresh exhibited professionalism and a genuine commitment to delivering exceptional products. The awards were beautifully crafted, and the printed stickers featuring our logo were sharp and vibrant, reflecting the high standards we aim to uphold as an NGO.

The attention to detail and creativity in the designs truly made our event memorable. We are sure that every child will feel really special receiving their momento.

If you’re looking for quality, reliability, and a touch of creativity, I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Naresh and his team. Thank you for making our event a resounding success!
